description: The average estimated difference between total precipitation and evapo-transpiration over a running total of 3 months. For each year, the difference between total precipitation and Thornthwaite potential evaporation is calculated for a three month moving window. The annual value is the average over those 12 values.
The maximum number of consecutive days over the season for which the precipitation was less than 1 mm.

The accumulated total of degrees celsius above 18°C mean temperature over the season. For any day above 18°C, the temperature that is accumulated is just the amount over 18°C. If the temperature is less than 18°C, nothing is accumulated. E.g, a day of 20°C accumulates 2°C.

Average minimum temperature over all the days in all coldwaves
